steps.name: Check that response status code equals to <HTTPStatus.OK: 200>
Check that length of courses equals to 1
Check that 'title' equals to 'Must third event degree nothing.'
Check that 'description' equals to 'Win actually successful station into meeting PM. Cup source knowledge plan simple before senior. Within these I notice nearly.'
